title: VimFu — :set relativenumber
description: Use :set relativenumber (or :set rnu) to show line numbers relative to the cursor position.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Relative line numbers show the distance from the cursor. This makes jump commands like 5 J or 3 K instant.
Set relative number — each line shows its distance from the cursor instead of its absolute line number.
Now each line shows its distance from the cursor. The cursor line shows zero.

steps.comment: --- Demo: move and show numbers update ---

steps.say: Move down five lines. Watch the numbers update.
The numbers shifted. The short form is set R N U.

steps.comment: --- Demo: combine with number for hybrid ---

steps.say: Combine with set number to get hybrid mode. The current line shows its absolute number.
Add set number on top of relative number for hybrid mode — current line shows absolute, others show relative.
Set relative number. Relative distances for easy jumps. Combine with set number for the best of both.
